evidence.claim: The system allows entry of a flight number.
evidence.fact: Air traffic controllers enter flight details and the system automatically proposes the earliest feasible slot, reducing manual workload.
evidence.user_story_span: The system allows entry of flight number

evidence.claim: The system registers flights with estimated times.
evidence.fact: The system registers incoming flights with their estimated times.
evidence.fact_span: registers incoming flights with their estimated times

evidence.claim: The system allows entry of estimated departure time.
evidence.fact: The system registers outgoing flights with their estimated times.
evidence.fact_span: registers outgoing flights with their estimated times

evidence.claim: The system allows entry of estimated arrival time.
evidence.fact: The system registers incoming flights with their estimated times.
evidence.fact_span: registers incoming flights with their estimated times

evidence.claim: The system allows entry of destination.
evidence.fact: The system gives arrivals priority over departures.

evidence.claim: The system allows entry of origin.
evidence.fact: The system registers outgoing flights with their estimated times.
evidence.fact_span: registers outgoing flights with their estimated times
